heroSubtitle: Your personal safety companion for exploring South Africa. Get real-time crime statistics and verified safety alerts right on your phone.
getStartedSubtitle: Safety and awareness are just a few taps away.
step1Text: Available for free on both iOS and Android devices.
step2Text: Allow location services for automatic, real-time alerts as you move.
step3Text: Get notified about crime hotspots and incident reports in your area.
featuresSubtitle: TravelHawk equips you with the tools you need to make informed decisions and explore with confidence.
feature1Text: Receive automatic, precinct-based safety alerts as you travel, without having to do a thing.
feature2Text: Stay informed with up-to-the-minute incident reports curated and verified by the TravelHawk team.
feature3Text: Access user-friendly, visualized crime data from all 1,162 police precincts.
feature4Text: Receive timely warnings about roads and areas reported for vehicle spiking and other dangers.
testimonialsSubtitle: Here's what our users are saying about peace of mind on their journeys.
testimonial1Text: "As a solo traveler, TravelHawk was a game-changer. I felt so much more aware of my surroundings and could plan my days with confidence. A must-have app!"
testimonial2Text: "I travel to Johannesburg often for work. This app helps me understand the security landscape of different neighborhoods, which is incredibly valuable."
testimonial3Text: "Even as a local, I've discovered so much about my own city. The incident reports are fantastic for knowing what's happening around me."
missionText: We believe that everyone has the right to feel safe and informed while exploring the beauty of South Africa. TravelHawk was born from a desire to empower travellers and residents with transparent, accessible, and real-time safety information. We're dedicated to building a community that looks out for one another, one alert at a time.
ctaSubtitle: Download TravelHawk today and join a community committed to safer travel.
footerProductOf: A product of Skeep Technologies (Pty) Ltd.
termsSection1Para1: By downloading, installing, or using the TravelHawk mobile application (“the App”), or any of its white-labeled counterparts or B2B enterprise services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions (“Terms”). If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the App. We may amend these Terms at any time by posting the amended terms in the App or on our website. Your continued use of the App after such posting will constitute your acceptance of the amended terms.
termsSection2Para1: TravelHawk provides users with real-time, location-based crime statistics, danger hotspots (such as Car Stoning zones), and safety alerts. The information provided is aggregated from various public and private sources and is intended for informational and educational purposes only. While we strive for accuracy, we do not guarantee the completeness, timeliness, or reliability of any information provided through the App.
termsSection3Title: 3. Explicit Disclaimer of Liability for Personal Safety
termsSection3Para1:
CAUTION
CRITICAL SAFETY NOTICE: TravelHawk is a supplementary informational tool, not a physical security service or a guarantee of safety. You acknowledge and agree that Skeep Technologies (Pty) Ltd, its affiliates, partners, and B2B clients cannot and do not guarantee your personal safety. Following the App’s recommendations, routing advice, or safety alerts (including but not limited to, staying in "Green Zones") does not immunize you from the risk of crime.
termsSection3Para2: You remain solely responsible for your own safety and situational awareness at all times. Skeep Technologies (Pty) Ltd shall under no circumstances be held liable for any personal injury, death, mugging, theft, property damage, or any other loss or crime experienced by you or your companions, regardless of whether you were following the App’s guidance, using its safe routing features, or located in an area deemed "safe" by the App. Crime is inherently unpredictable, and the App's data may not reflect real-time, sudden, or unreported incidents.
termsSection4Para1: Skeep Technologies (Pty) Ltd offers corporate packages, white-labeled versions of the App, and enterprise tiers.
termsSection4Li1: Corporate Users: If you are accessing the App via a corporate activation code, your use is still bound by these Terms. Your employer or the issuing organization does not assume liability for your safety through the provision of this App.
termsSection4Li2: B2B Clients: B2B partners utilizing our white-label solutions, App Store revenue share models, or webhook integrations are subject to separate Master Service Agreements (MSAs). However, all end-users of white-labeled apps remain bound by the safety disclaimers and usage terms outlined herein.
termsSection5Para1: Certain features of the App may be subject to a subscription or In-App Purchase (IAP). Payments are processed securely via the Apple App Store or Google Play Store.
termsSection5Li1: You agree to abide by the respective app store's terms regarding subscriptions, renewals, and refunds.
termsSection5Li2: Skeep Technologies (Pty) Ltd does not directly process or store your credit card information.
termsSection6Para1: You agree to use the App only for lawful purposes. You are solely responsible for your use of the App and any consequences thereof. You must not use the App to harass, abuse, stalk, threaten, or otherwise violate the legal rights of others. Unauthorized scraping, data mining, or reverse engineering of the App's crime data and algorithms is strictly prohibited.
termsSection7Para1: The App is provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis. We expressly disclaim all warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, including, but not limited to, the implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement. We make no warranty that the App will meet your requirements, be uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free.
termsSection8Para1: You expressly understand and agree that Skeep Technologies (Pty) Ltd shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or exemplary damages, including but not limited to, damages for loss of profits, goodwill, use, data, or other intangible losses resulting from the use or the inability to use the App, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages.
termsSection9Para1: All rights, title, and interest in and to the App (excluding user-provided content) are and will remain the exclusive property of Skeep Technologies (Pty) Ltd and its licensors. The App is protected by copyright, trademark, and other laws of both South Africa and foreign countries.
termsSection10Para1: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of South Africa, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. You agree to submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in Johannesburg, South Africa, to resolve any legal matter arising from these Terms.
termsSection11Para1: If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at: support@travelhawk.co.za.
privacySection1Para1: This Privacy Policy outlines how Skeep Technologies (Pty) Ltd (“we,” “us,” or “our”) collects, uses, discloses, and protects your information when you use the TravelHawk mobile application (“the App”), as well as any white-labeled versions or enterprise services provided to our B2B partners. We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring that your personal information is handled in a safe and responsible manner.
privacySection2Para1: We collect the following types of information to provide and improve our services:
privacySection2Li1: Location Data: With your explicit consent, we access your device’s precise location to provide you with relevant, real-time safety alerts (such as crime density warnings and danger hotspots) for your current area. You can disable location services at any time through your device settings, though this will significantly limit the App's core functionality.
privacySection2Li2: Usage and Analytics Data: We automatically collect anonymized data about how you interact with our App. This may include information such as your device type, operating system, session duration, features used, and crash reports.
privacySection2Li3: Account and Subscription Data: If you create an account, use a corporate activation code, or make an In-App Purchase (IAP), we may collect the necessary data to validate your subscription tier. Please note that payment information is securely handled by the respective app stores (Apple App Store or Google Play Store), and we do not store your credit card details.
privacySection3Para1: The information we collect is used for the following purposes:
privacySection3Li1: To operate and maintain the App, including verifying corporate or premium subscriptions.
privacySection3Li2: To provide you with location-specific safety alerts, text-to-speech warnings, and dynamic safety content.
privacySection3Li3: To monitor and analyze usage and trends to improve your experience.
privacySection3Li4: To diagnose and fix technical problems.
privacySection3Li5: To measure the effectiveness of our in-app advertising and marketing campaigns.
privacySection4Para1: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal identification information to third parties. We may disclose your information in the following circumstances:
privacySection4Li1: B2B and Corporate Partners: If you access the App using a corporate activation code or through a white-labeled enterprise version, we may share anonymized, aggregated usage data with the issuing organization to report on service adoption and general safety trends. We do not share your real-time individual tracking data with your employer or the corporate partner unless explicitly authorized by you for a specific workplace safety feature.
privacySection4Li2: Trusted Affiliates and Service Providers: We may share aggregated demographic or operational information with trusted affiliates to optimize our services.
privacySection4Li3: Legal Requirements: We may disclose your information if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities (e.g., a court or a government agency).
privacySection5Para1: We are committed to protecting your information. We adopt appropriate data collection, storage, and processing practices and security measures to protect against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction of your personal information, corporate activation credentials, and data stored within our App.
privacySection6Para1: By using our App, you consent to our collection and use of information as described in this Privacy Policy. For location-based services, we will request your explicit consent before accessing your device's location data.
privacySection7Para1: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our business models (such as new B2B integrations or App Store policies). We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page within the App or on our website. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.
privacySection8Para1: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: support@travelhawk.co.za.
contactSubtitle: Have a question or feedback? We'd love to hear from you. Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
sourcesIntro: Transparency and accuracy are core to our mission at TravelHawk. This page provides a comprehensive list of the official, publicly available government sources used to provide data within the application.
sourcesDisclaimerText: TravelHawk is an independent application and does NOT represent any government entity. This app is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially connected with the South African government, the South African Police Service (SAPS), or any foreign government. All data is aggregated from the sources listed below for informational purposes only. While we strive for accuracy, we do not claim ownership or guarantee the correctness of the data, as it is dependent on the original public releases.
